title: zanthoxylum limonella
intro: Zanthoxylum limonella, also known as the prickly ash or toothache tree, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat toothaches, arthritis, and other pain-related conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Zanthoxylum limonella is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine to alleviate pain and promote overall well-being.
